headline: Anthropic removes Claude Code from Pro subscription tier
body: Anthropic has removed Claude Code from its $20/month Pro plan, affecting new and existing subscribers who relied on the coding feature. This shift signals a strategic pivot toward paid AI coding tools and reflects growing vendor consolidation around premium model tiers. For healthcare AI vendors and consultants, this underscores the volatility of LLM platform economics and the importance of diversifying across multiple model providers rather than building clinical workflows on single-vendor coding capabilities. EHR integration teams should reassess dependencies on Claude Code for documentation automation or clinical decision support tooling. The move also suggests healthcare organizations may need to budget for enterprise-tier access to maintain continuity in AI-assisted workflow optimization.
